articles.description: Follow updates and reaction as Igor Tudor "mutually agrees" to leave his role as interim head coach of Tottenham.
articles.title: Igor Tudor leaves Tottenham Hotspur after seven games in charge of Premier League club

articles.description: Igor Tudor leaves Tottenham Hotspur with immediate effect.
articles.title: Igor Tudor leaves Tottenham after just seven games in charge

articles.description: F1 finds itself in something of a tangled web as it tries to refine the new rules, improve safety and ensure the drivers are happy without compromising racing.
articles.title: Japanese Grand Prix: What can sport's bosses do to help keep Max Verstappen in F1?

articles.description: With one game to go until Thomas Tuchel picks his England World Cup squad, BBC Sport reporters choose their starting XI's for the summer. Who would you pick?
articles.title: England: BBC Sport choose their World Cup XIs - who would you pick?

articles.description: Veron Mosengo-Omba, a controversial figure, leaves at a turbulent time for African football.
articles.title: Veron Mosengo-Omba: Caf general secretary resigns amid Afcon final fallout

articles.description: Kimi Antonelli takes his second win in succession and the lead of the world championship at the Japanese Grand Prix.
articles.title: Japanese Grand Prix result: Kimi Antonelli wins from Oscar Piastri at Suzuka to become youngest championship leader

articles.description: The Milwaukee Bucks lose to the San Antonio Spurs and will miss the NBA play-offs for the first time since 2016.
articles.title: NBA: Defeat by San Antonio Spurs eliminates Milwaukee Bucks from play-off contention

articles.description: Briton Moses Itauma thought 'did I really do that' after knocking out Jermaine Franklin with an uppercut in the fifth round of their fight in Manchester.
articles.title: Itauma vs Franklin: Moses Itauma wins step-up fight with crushing fifth round stoppage

articles.description: Scotland continue their World Cup preparations with a friendly against Ivory Coast on Tuesday, but why is this away game being played at Everton's new stadium in Liverpool?
articles.title: Why are Scotland playing Ivory Coast in Liverpool?

articles.description: The younger brother of Ryder Cup star Matt Fitzpatrick claims a first DP Tour title a week after his sibling wins on the PGA Tour.
articles.title: Indian Open: Alex Fitzpatrick creates history with maiden victory after brother Matt's PGA Tour win
